direction: from is the grammatical subject: from -relation-> to
authority_policy: Mathematical-object layer from the Encyclopedia NOMENCLATURE (internal->standard, with relationship). Unit->object 'about' edges (LaTeX-normalized symbol intersection + multi-word name match) live in the object-membership bridge. Objects touched by units in >=2 subject families are cross-domain junctions.
